mapper.select: SELECT w.*, u.username FROM wallet w LEFT JOIN user u ON w.user_id = u.id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT w.*, u.username FROM wallet w LEFT JOIN user u ON w.user_id = u.id WHERE w.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet (user_id, balance, total_recharge, total_consume, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{balance}, #{totalRecharge}, #{totalConsume}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE wallet SET balance = #{balance}, total_recharge = #{totalRecharge}, total_consume = #{totalConsume}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE wallet SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT w.*, u.username FROM wallet w LEFT JOIN user u ON w.user_id = u.id ORDER BY w.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wallet w LEFT JOIN user u ON w.user_id = u.id
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
